entries.title: system_server hook design
entries.description: All interception runs inside system_server. Target activities are never created before auth completes.

entries.title: libxposed API 102 hot-reload
entries.description: Module supports hot reload via autoHotReload. No reboot required after most updates.

entries.title: Re-lock on screen wake
entries.description: All unlocked packages are cleared when the screen powers on.

entries.title: Drops per-process hook model
entries.description: The original Activity-lifecycle hook design (ActivityHooks, Blackout, Trampoline) has been removed. Requires system_server scope enabled in LSPosed Manager.
